creator: jb1234abcd@gmail.com
text:
# cd /usr/ports/www/opera
# make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for www/opera
===>   Deinstalling opera-12.02
pkg_delete: package 'opera-12.02' is required by these other packages
and may not be deinstalled (but I'll delete it anyway):
opera-linuxplugins-12.02
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/lib/opera/pluginwrapper'
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/lib/opera'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package `opera-12.02'
(perhaps the packing list is incorrectly specified?)

Note: these error messages were received during yesterday's opera upgrade
('portmaster opera') as well.

$ ls -al /usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache 
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  8524864 Sep  7 09:31 /usr/local/share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache
$ ls -al /usr/local/lib/opera/pluginwrapper/
total 488
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel     512 Sep  7 09:31 .
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel     512 Sep  7 09:31 ..
-r-xr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  451080 Sep  6 22:23 operapluginwrapper-ia32-linux

$ cat /usr/ports/www/opera/pkg-plist
..
lib/opera/gstreamer/plugins/libgstoperamatroska.so
lib/opera/gstreamer/plugins/libgstoperavp8.so
lib/opera/liboperagtk2.so
lib/opera/liboperakde4.so
lib/opera/opera
lib/opera/plugins/README
lib/opera/pluginwrapper/operapluginwrapper
lib/opera/pluginwrapper/operapluginwrapper-native
..
share/icons/hicolor/icon-theme.cache
..

How-To-Repeat: deinstall or upgrade Opera port.
